title: penstemon perfoliatus
intro: Penstemon perfoliatus, also known as the Bastard Toadshade or Bastard Penstemon, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Penstemon genus and native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon perfoliatus include the potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and wounds. Herbal preparations of Penstemon perfoliatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
